"'''A Stranger in Town'''" was a short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3]]'', written by the [[Fillbach Brothers]].

{{Comics-stub}}

==Plot summary==
On an unknown [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] walks into town bearing a massive package upon his shoulders. Ignoring the taunts and jeers of the crowd, the green [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] walks into a [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] and orders a drink, having a one-sided conversation with a friendlier citizen. When word comes that a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] army has arrived, Yoda wordlessly slips out of his seat to reveal his secret to all: the box concealed an enormous [[Chaingun/Legends|chaingun]].

Quickly utilizing it against the amassed [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]], [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s, [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]], and [[unidentified tracked tank]]s, Yoda defeats the army save the stout [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. Igniting his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to cut away at the man's armor, Yoda causes the commander to run into the distance. Leaving the town to stare in amazement, Yoda packs up once more and heads out.
